case_title: KALMAN A. ZEIGER VS. CHRISTOPHER P. PILLETTE

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT RETURNED UNDELIVERED TO DEFENDANT.
